signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's April 2026 surge, with the token gaining nearly 10% in the past week to break above $1.50 before settling at ~$1.42, signaling a fundamental shift in market sentiment.[1]

signals.headline: Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Series Lead | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Series Lead | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Cleveland Cavaliers won Game 2 of their NBA first-round playoff series against the Toronto Raptors tonight in Cleveland, leading the series 2-0 after Donovan Mitchell's 30 points and James Harden's 28 points; Scottie Barnes led Toronto with 26 points.[1][2]
